code: import React,{createContext,useContext,useState,useEffect}from"react";import{registerInventorySetter}from"../../managers/InventoryManager";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const InventoryContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext(undefined);export const useInventory=()=>{const context=useContext(InventoryContext);if(!context){throw new Error("useInventory must be used within an InventoryProvider");}return context;};export const InventoryProvider=_ref=>{let{children}=_ref;const[items,setItems]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{registerInventorySetter(setItems);},[]);const updateSlot=async(item,newSlot)=>{try{await fetch("/api/inventory/update-slot",{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},body:JSON.stringify({item_id:item.inventory_id,new_slot:newSlot,user_id:item.user_id})});}catch(err){console.error("Failed to update slot",err);}};const useItem=async(item,index)=>{if(!item||item.quantity<=0)return;try{const res=await fetch(`/api/inventory/use/${item.inventory_id}`,{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json",Accept:"application/json"}});const result=await res.json();if(!res.ok){const msg=result.remaining_seconds!==undefined?`${item.name} is on cooldown. Try again in ${result.remaining_seconds}s.`:result.error||"Failed to use item.";window.postMessage({type:"sendWhisper",content:msg},"*");return;}window.postMessage({type:"sendWhisper",content:result.message||`You used ${item.name}.`},"*");setItems(prevItems=>{const newItems=[...prevItems];const updatedItem={...newItems[index]};updatedItem.quantity-=1;updatedItem.last_used_at=new Date().toISOString();newItems[index]=updatedItem.quantity>0?updatedItem:undefined;return newItems;});}catch(err){console.error("Error using item:",err);window.postMessage({type:"sendWhisper",content:"There was an error using the item."},"*");}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(InventoryContext.Provider,{value:{items,setItems,updateSlot,useItem},children:children});};
